welcome_offer.description: As High As 200,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $15,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 3 months of Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible for an offer.

earning_rates.notes: First $150,000 in combined purchases from top 2 categories each calendar year, then 1X. Categories include: advertising (online, TV, radio at U.S. media providers), U.S. electronic goods/software/cloud providers, U.S. gas stations, U.S. restaurants (including takeout/delivery), transit (rideshare, trains, taxis, ferries, parking, buses, tolls, subways), and U.S. wireless phone service providers

earning_rates.category: Flights and prepaid hotels booked via Amex Travel

other_benefits: Secondary rental car coverage (in U.S. and abroad when paying for rental with card and declining CDW)

recurring_credits.name: Flexible Business Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20 in statement credits each month for eligible U.S. purchases at FedEx, Grubhub, and Office Supply Stores. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Walmart+ Membership Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $12.95 statement credit each month after paying for a Walmart+ membership. Up to $155.40 annually.

recurring_credits.name: FedEx, Grubhub, Office Supply Stores Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20 in statement credits monthly after using the Business Gold Card for eligible U.S. purchases at FedEx, Grubhub, and Office Supply Stores. Enrollment required.
